text: Hey Jarvis, what does my schedule look like for Friday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, October 25. You have the CareConnect stakeholder review at 3 PM, and pediatrician checkup for Lily.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Good planning. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: That sounds critical. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Managing some allergy issues today. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Staying active is key. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Updating our financial spreadsheets. The refi quote saves us about $250 a month. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. Smart financial planning. That's $3,000 annually. It could cover the Colorado trip or 529 plans. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. Great update. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. VP Greg Holloway is complaining about the infrastructure costs for CareConnect. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. That sounds critical. We can present a cost-benefit analysis showing that dropping these optimizations will cost more in support tickets. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Reading scientific papers late tonight. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've indexed the research notes. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Bedtime can be a challenge. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. VP Greg Holloway is complaining about the infrastructure costs for CareConnect. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. That sounds critical. We can present a cost-benefit analysis showing that dropping these optimizations will cost more in support tickets. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Took Lily to her medical checkup. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. That's good medical feedback. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Updating our financial spreadsheets. We are comparing school districts in Frisco to find the best neighborhood. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. Smart financial planning. Liberty Elementary has excellent reviews. The neighborhood near it is highly recommended. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Interesting. School projects are fun. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick log: Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has scheduling portal. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's break this down. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping scheduling portal in the MVP. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. I checked the telemetry feeds. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Busy day at Vertex Health. Dealt with bedtime tantrums but made it through. Got document checklists ready for the mortgage refinance. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
